chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-381 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on MA 3105/24 3.For hearing of main case 4.For orders on MA 3106/24 03-02-2025 None present for the applicant. ***** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received so far. Record reflects that this matter was presented in the office on 04.07.2024, but since then neither applicant nor his counsel has taken any initiative to have the matter fixed in Court for issuance of notices to other side. Perhaps, the applicant has lost his interest in proceeding with this matter or the purpose, for which instant application was filed, has been achieved. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
